misc: The phenomenon called 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition in a past Hector event
biography: Okko, a familiar face from Hirsala Golf, has been a consistent presence at the Hector Trophée, gracing the competition on five occasions. A past winner of the Hector Trophée, Okko brings a wealth of experience to the greens.

Beyond his undeniable skill, Okko is known for his colorful personality. The infamous 'Okkotoberfest' is a phenomenon forever linked to Okko, a nod to a past Hector event where his, shall we say, spirited celebrations became the stuff of legends.

While he has not yet claimed the Victor Trophy for individual excellence, Okko's focus on teamwork and camaraderie makes him a formidable opponent in the pairs format. However, it is with some regret that we note that Okko is not scheduled to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. Though, as we know, the world of golf is ever-changing, and last-minute entries are always a possibility.

It is also worth noting that Okko has historically struggled with back problems, a challenge that he has met with characteristic resilience. Despite this, he remains an active member of the Hector Trophée community, his passion for the game undiminished.
